prompt: Commercial product photography of a black premium leather car armrest cushion installed on a tan leather center console. A driver's arm is resting comfortably on it. The cushion has a side mesh storage pocket containing a smartphone. High-end car interior, luxury lighting, cinematic feel. Large Russian text at the top: 'Снятие напряжения'. Subtext: 'Комфорт при вождении'. Aspect ratio 3:4. --ar 3:4

Top-down view of a luxury black leather car armrest cover with perforated texture on the sides. Installed in a modern car with brown leather seats and carbon fiber trim. Minimalist and clean composition. Russian text overlay: 'Элегантный дизайн' and 'Обновите ваш салон'. High resolution, photorealistic, no brand logos. --ar 3:4

Split screen layout showing product details. Left: Hand placing a phone into the side mesh pocket of the black leather armrest. Right: Close-up macro shots of the high-quality leather stitching and the mesh material. Studio lighting, clean background. Russian text: 'Место для хранения' and 'Премиум экокожа'. --ar 3:4

Compatibility chart for car armrest. Top image shows a standard center console with a green checkmark. Bottom shows three images of split-opening and irregular armrests with red 'X' marks. Scientific and clear layout. Russian title: 'Совместимость'. Labels: 'Подходит' and 'Не подходит'. Clean infographic style. --ar 3:4
